dj_text: You're on That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. We have a zero-complaint policy. Just kidding. We have a zero-complaint-response policy. From Friday I'm in Love [Bardcore] to Somebody that I used to know (Medieval version). In the mix!

title: Somebody that I used to know (Medieval version)
